about.summary: Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence, Full Stack Development, and Product-Driven Software Engineering. Experienced in building explainable machine learning systems, scalable web applications, and AI-powered products. Proven leadership through managing sponsorship portfolios exceeding Rs. 5 lakh and coordinating large cross-functional teams.

education.degree: Post Graduate Program, Product Management using Agentic AI

featured_projects.title: StressIntel PRO
featured_projects.description: Explainable AI stress diagnostics platform with SHAP interpretability and OpenCV analytics.
featured_projects.problem: Traditional stress assessments rely on subjective, manual surveys and lack real-time interpretability.
featured_projects.solution: Built an AI-powered stress diagnostics platform using XGBoost, Random Forest, and behavioral analytics. Integrated SHAP Explainable AI to provide real-time feature-level feedback and predictions.
features: Real-time stress prediction using behavioral analytics
Explainable AI feature attribution via SHAP visual waterfall maps
Computer-vision based facial stress indicators and eye-blink rate monitoring
Dynamic, client-side diagnostics reporting and telemetry tracking
results: 91.2% verified prediction accuracy on ensemble model validation
24+ distinct behavioral and facial metrics analyzed dynamically
Reduced diagnostic assessment latency to sub-second thresholds
featured_projects.architecture_desc: Web App (Flask) -> OpenCV Video Stream Processor -> Feature Extraction (24+ behavioral indicators) -> XGBoost Classifier -> SHAP Explainer (SHAP waterfall/force plots) -> Interactive Chart.js dashboard.
challenges: Optimizing video frame parsing frequency in OpenCV to run in real-time without blocking the user interface thread.
Generating consistent SHAP waterfall plots dynamically on tree ensemble predictions with low processing latency.
lessons_learned: Implemented a multi-threaded execution queue in Flask to handle video frame classification asynchronously.
Mastered the integration of explainable AI paradigms in clinical workflows, transforming raw predictions into transparent user feedback.

featured_projects.title: ResumeAnalyzer-XAI
featured_projects.description: ATS resume screening platform supporting 20+ job categories with explainable scoring.
featured_projects.problem: Candidates face a 'black box' challenge with Applicant Tracking Systems, receiving automated rejections without skill gap feedback.
featured_projects.solution: Developed an explainable machine learning platform that parses resume text, matches candidate scores across job descriptions, and uses SHAP to pinpoint missing skills.
features: Automated PDF and text-layout resume parsing engine
Job description matching algorithm supporting 20+ job categories
Explainable AI-driven recommendations displaying positive/negative impact criteria
Personalized skill gap advice dashboards for candidate profile optimization
results: Validated and trained models on a corpus of 2,500+ resume documents
Supports automated indexing and classification for 20+ technical and non-technical fields
Helped candidates identify missing resume attributes and improve match rates by 30%
featured_projects.architecture_desc: PDF/DOCX Uploader -> Text Extraction -> TF-IDF Vectorizer -> Machine Learning Classification Models -> SHAP explanation mapping missing skills -> Dynamic Dashboard interface.
challenges: Extracting clean structural text from multi-column tables and stylized resumes without layout distortion.
Mapping high-dimensional TF-IDF vectors into a stable SHAP feature space to output human-readable skill recommendations.
lessons_learned: Leveraged layout-aware text extraction models and rule-based fallback regex heuristics to process noisy document structures.
Gained deep expertise in text preprocessing, TF-IDF representations, and feature importance mappings.

featured_projects.title: InterviewGPT
featured_projects.description: AI interview preparation platform powered by RAG and LLM workflows.
featured_projects.problem: Generic question banks fail to mock realistic, customized interview environments based on individual experience profiles.
featured_projects.solution: Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) platform that ingests user resumes, matches candidate backgrounds to targeting roles, and conducts mock interviews.
features: Context-aware dynamic question generation based on resume parameters
RAG pipelines linking resume experience points to target job specifications
Real-time LLM-driven performance evaluation and analytical scoring
Semantic matching using FAISS database indices for optimized chunk retrieval
results: Created an interactive, responsive simulation sandbox for technical prep
Reduced query retrieval speeds using optimized index parameters
Generated highly tailored, constructive feedback grids covering 5+ metrics
featured_projects.architecture_desc: Resume Parser -> Semantic Chunking -> FAISS Vector Database (Embeddings) -> RAG Orchestration -> OpenAI GPT LLM -> Feedback & Scoring Engine.
challenges: Preventing target LLM hallucinations where generated technical questions referenced projects or frameworks not in the candidate's profile.
Managing API token budget constraints during long-running multi-turn conversation simulation scripts.
lessons_learned: Optimized prompt structures and enforced strict context-aware limits to bind LLM responses to input documentation data.
Mastered advanced RAG pipelines, semantic indexing, and conversational history handling.

featured_projects.title: Enterprise Booking Engine
featured_projects.description: Scalable booking and transaction management platform.
featured_projects.problem: Corporate event organizations struggle with fragmented booking flows, payment latency, and loose vendor onboarding pipelines.
featured_projects.solution: Designed and delivered a modular booking and financial operations engine. Optimized transactional database models to handle high concurrent B2B transactions.
features: B2B vendor onboarding and corporate portal funnels
Optimized transactional checkout workflows with database rollbacks
Analytical metrics dashboards reporting revenue and vendor transaction logs
Centralized API manager communicating booking events and receipts
results: Supervised development lifecycle from product discovery through rollout
Drastically reduced transaction failure rates during concurrent bookings
Integrated central reporting system mapping multi-channel revenue data
featured_projects.architecture_desc: PHP MVC Backend -> Relational Schema (MySQL) -> API Layer -> Web Client (JavaScript/AJAX) -> Dashboards.
challenges: Maintaining ACID compliance and preventing double-booking anomalies during concurrent client queries.
Bridging custom business agreements into standardized, scalable database relations.
lessons_learned: Utilized MySQL row-level locking and transaction isolation levels to maintain data integrity.
Developed clear B2B product requirements (PRDs) to successfully synchronize commercial and software engineering teams.

highlights: Secured commercial sponsorship funding exceeding Rs. 5,00,000 through B2B negotiations and partner outreach.
Onboarded corporate giants including Decathlon, RedBus, AbhiBus, Nescafe, Amul, Barista, and Unstop.
Governed total budget lines, compliance audits, and asset allocations for over 20+ major collegiate events.
Led and mentored a cross-functional department of over 100 student volunteers.

testimonials.name: Project Manager
testimonials.text: Abhiuday has an exceptional ability to bridge the gap between technical AI capabilities and product requirements. His work on feature scoping and market analysis for our healthcare systems was top-notch.

testimonials.name: Operations Director
testimonials.text: As both a developer and operations trainee, Abhiuday demonstrated engineering excellence and stellar leadership. He kept cross-functional teams synchronized and delivered on time.

testimonials.name: Program Lead Instructor
testimonials.text: Abhiuday stands out as a product builder who understands the future of Agentic AI. His strategic thinking and focus on execution make him an asset to any team.

testimonials.name: Faculty Advisor
testimonials.text: Abhiuday's leadership as the Finance Head was stellar. Raising over ₹5 Lakhs in sponsorships and managing budgets for 15+ events with 100+ volunteers showed his maturity and operational execution.
